server.name: duckduckgo
server.description: Community-maintained server for DuckDuckGo search. Not published by or affiliated with DuckDuckGo.
server.title: Private Web Search

tools.name: fetch_content
tools.description: Fetch and extract the main text content from a webpage. Strips out navigation, headers, footers, scripts, and styles to return clean readable text. Use this after searching to read the full content of a specific result. Supports pagination for long pages via start_index and max_length.

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: The full URL of the webpage to fetch (must start with http:// or https://).

arguments.name: max_length
arguments.desc: Maximum number of characters to return (default: 8000). Increase for more content per request or decrease for quicker responses.

arguments.name: start_index
arguments.desc: Character offset to start reading from (default: 0). Use this to paginate through long content.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo. Returns a list of results with titles, URLs, and snippets. Use this to find current information, research topics, or locate specific websites. For best results, use specific and descriptive search queries.

arguments.name: query
arguments.desc: The search query string. Be specific for better results (e.g., 'Python asyncio tutorial' rather than 'Python').

arguments.name: max_results
arguments.desc: Maximum number of results to return, between 1 and 20 (default: 10).

arguments.name: region
arguments.desc: Optional region/language code to localize results. Examples: 'us-en' (USA/English), 'uk-en' (UK/English), 'de-de' (Germany/German), 'fr-fr' (France/French), 'jp-ja' (Japan/Japanese), 'cn-zh' (China/Chinese), 'wt-wt' (no region). Leave empty to use the server default.
